_comment: Panel registry. Each panel mirrors a Grafana panel from the 'Lenses ConsumerGroup Lag' dashboard (UID o7eRAUOpwerz3). To add a new panel, append an entry with a unique id; the dashboard will render it automatically inside the named section. Variables in 'expr' starting with $ are substituted from the data source's static_labels OR from the per-request scope (env, topic, consumer_group).

panels.title: Lenses Status
panels.description: Binary up/down indicator. 1 = the Lenses exporter is healthy, 0 = it is unreachable.

panels.title: Consumer Group / Topic Lag
panels.description: Sum of lag across all partitions of the topic for this consumer group.

panels.title: Consumer Group Lag
panels.description: Worst-partition lag — the slowest partition's lag. Drives the breach decision.

panels.title: Consumer Group Rebalancing or InActive Status
panels.description: Returns 1 if the metric has no data (consumer rebalancing or inactive); empty otherwise.
